title: Switory 50pcs Padded Envelopes A6 Bubble Mailers Packaging Bags 4X7In Jiffy Bags Small Envelopes, Bubble Lined Wrap Poly Mailers Bags for Shipping Mailing 10.2x17.7cm, Black
features: 【Black Bubble Mailers】Usable Size: 4 x 7, pack of 50. These small bubble envelopes mailers add a pop of color to the mail and stands out from the rest, quite different from the standard one. Your customers will look forward to that charming blackenvelope in the mail. Those cute packing padded mailers are lightweight mailing envelops,.

【Tear Resistance Envelopes】This padded package envelopes are with durable and sturdy surface, work great instead of paper versions that tear with sharp,heavy, or weird shaped products. Also made with multilayered polyethylene sheets, provide an excellent waterproof & cushioning protection for shipment.

【Multipurpose Bubble Mailers】 You can use these to mail lip glosses, earrings, cosmetics, paintings, fashion accessories, jewelry, medicines, seeds and bulbs, makeup tools, pens, small gifts or objects, small buissnes supplies, and a lot more. They are padded enough to protect fragile things during shipping. The laminated top allows you to attach self-adhesive stamps and address labels easily.

【Self-Adhering Envelopes】The black poly bubble mailers come with a self-adhesive tamperproof seal. Once the envelope has been sealed, it cannot be opened without visible signs of tampering. The smooth surface of the mailers makes it easy to stick stamps and address labels. Mail without worry with Switory delivery packaging & shipping bags.
【Color】This listing is for a pack of 50 bubble mailers that are a black in color.
